name: dotnet-quality
description: .NET development quality toolkit — TDD workflow, CI failure diagnosis, and auto-formatting hook.

hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.cs) slnfile=$(find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -name '*.sln' -o -name '*.slnx' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$slnfile" ] && { dotnet format "$slnfile" --include "$f" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true; } || { dotnet format --include "$f" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true; }; break;; esac; done
